name: describe-data
responsibility: Generate descriptive statistics and data overview

name: clean-data
responsibility: Clean and prepare raw data for analysis

name: merge-data
responsibility: Merge multiple datasets with diagnostics

name: balance-table
responsibility: Create treatment-control balance table using iebaltab

name: summary-stats
responsibility: Generate publication-ready summary statistics table

name: regress
responsibility: Run regression with fixed effects using reghdfe + estout

name: iv-2sls
responsibility: Instrumental variables / 2SLS estimation with first-stage diagnostics

name: did
responsibility: Difference-in-differences estimation

name: staggered-did
responsibility: Staggered DiD with modern estimators (Callaway-SantAnna, Sun-Abraham, etc.)

name: event-study
responsibility: Event study estimation with leads and lags

name: rdd
responsibility: Regression discontinuity design estimation

name: synth-control
responsibility: Synthetic control method estimation

name: bunching
responsibility: Bunching estimation at kink/notch points

name: shift-share
responsibility: Shift-share / Bartik instrument estimation

name: mht-correction
responsibility: Multiple hypothesis testing correction (Romano-Wolf, Bonferroni, etc.)

name: coefficient-plot
responsibility: Generate coefficient plot with confidence intervals

name: event-study-plot
responsibility: Generate event study plot with pre/post-treatment periods

name: binscatter
responsibility: Create binned scatter plot with optional controls

name: rdd-plot
responsibility: Generate RDD plot with polynomial fit and discontinuity

name: parallel-trends
responsibility: Plot pre-treatment parallel trends for DiD validation

name: forest-plot
responsibility: Generate forest plot for heterogeneous treatment effects

name: write-abstract
responsibility: Draft paper abstract following What/How/Findings/Implications formula

name: write-intro
responsibility: Draft introduction using Head/Evans/Bellemare method

name: write-model
responsibility: Draft theoretical model section with propositions and testable predictions

name: write-data-section
responsibility: Draft data section with source, sample construction, variable definitions

name: write-results
responsibility: Draft results section: main result first, then robustness and mechanisms

name: write-conclusion
responsibility: Draft conclusion: summary, limitations, implications, future research

name: write-title
responsibility: Generate paper title following Impact/Evidence format

name: referee-report
responsibility: Generate constructive referee report with 5-step protocol

name: self-review
responsibility: Run self-review using Top 10 rejection reasons checklist

name: rr-response
responsibility: Draft R&R response letter with comment triage strategy

name: magnitude-check
responsibility: Assess economic magnitude of effects against domain benchmarks

name: pre-submit-check
responsibility: Run comprehensive 3-level pre-submission checklist

name: verify-numbers
responsibility: Cross-check hard-coded numbers in LaTeX against code output

name: check-citations
responsibility: Verify all citations exist in bib file and are not fabricated

name: check-compilation
responsibility: Verify LaTeX compiles cleanly with no undefined references
